title: With the Frogs
author: J.C. Greenburg
desc: Ant-sized Andrew, Judy & Thudd build bug-suits and a flying GNAT to help Uncle Al save the disappearing frogs!

q.en: At the start of 'With the Frogs,' where are ant-sized Andrew and Judy?
q.zh: 在《和青蛙在一起》一开始，变成蚂蚁那么小的安德鲁和朱迪在哪里？

options.en: Outside a kitchen window on a ledge
options.zh: 在厨房窗外的一个窗台上
在 Goa 巨蛇机器里面
在阿尔叔叔的吉普车底下

explain.en: The chapter opens with Andrew grunting on a ledge outside a kitchen window, struggling into his metal-tube pants, while Judy speaks from the windowsill behind him.
explain.zh: 这一章开头，安德鲁在厨房窗外的一个窗台上哼哼着，费力地穿金属管做的裤子，而朱迪在身后的窗台上和他说话。

q.en: What does Andrew call his new furry black-and-yellow-striped suit?
q.zh: 安德鲁把他那件毛茸茸的、黑黄条纹的新衣服叫做什么？

explain.en: Andrew tells Judy, 'I made us these suits. They're called Wannabees,' because since they are bug-sized they need some bug advantages.
explain.zh: 安德鲁对朱迪说：“我给我们做了这些套装，它们叫 Wannabee（想当蜜蜂）”，因为既然他们只有虫子那么大，就需要一些虫子的“优势”。

q.en: Who is Thudd in this story?
q.zh: 在这个故事里，撒得（Thudd）是谁？

options.en: Andrew's little silver robot best friend
options.zh: 安德鲁小小的银色机器人好朋友

explain.en: Thudd is Andrew's 'little silver robot and pocket-sized best friend,' squeaking 'Hit Drewd!' from a pocket in Andrew's Wannabee.
explain.zh: 撒得是安德鲁“小小的银色机器人、可以放进口袋的最好的朋友”，他在安德鲁的 Wannabee 口袋里吱吱叫着：“打德鲁！”

q.en: Why did Andrew make the Wannabee suits?
q.zh: 安德鲁为什么要做 Wannabee 套装？

options.en: To keep warm in the desert
To give them bug advantages while helping Uncle Al save the frogs
options.zh: 为了获得虫子的优势，好帮阿尔叔叔拯救青蛙

explain.en: Andrew says, 'since we're bug-sized, we need some bug advantages,' and they must 'help Uncle Al save the frogs' at the pond beyond the yard.
explain.zh: 安德鲁说：“既然我们只有虫子那么大，就需要一些虫子的优势”，而且他们必须去院子那头的池塘“帮阿尔叔叔拯救青蛙”。

q.en: What frog problem are Andrew and Judy trying to help Uncle Al with?
q.zh: 安德鲁和朱迪想帮阿尔叔叔解决什么青蛙问题？

options.en: Saving frogs, some of which have gone extinct
options.zh: 拯救青蛙，其中一些已经灭绝了
建造一台新的 Goa 巨蛇

explain.en: Andrew tells Judy, 'Some frogs have even gone extinct. Uncle Al needs our help,' and there is a frog pond just beyond the yard.
explain.zh: 安德鲁告诉朱迪：“有些青蛙甚至已经灭绝了。阿尔叔叔需要我们的帮助”，而且院子外面就有一个青蛙池塘。

q.en: What flying machine does Andrew build to travel to the frog pond?
q.zh: 安德鲁造了什么飞行器，用来去青蛙池塘？

explain.en: Under a dead leaf Andrew reveals the GNAT. 'GNAT is short for Global Navigation and Transportation,' his odd flying machine.
explain.zh: 安德鲁在一片枯叶下面展示了 GNAT。“GNAT 是 Global Navigation and Transportation（全球导航与运输器）的缩写”，那是他奇怪的飞行器。

q.en: What does the GNAT look like when Andrew reveals it?
q.zh: 安德鲁展示 GNAT 时，它长什么样？

options.en: A machine with buggy wings, two seats, and three wheels
options.zh: 一台有昆虫翅膀、两个座位和三个轮子的机器

explain.en: The GNAT has 'a pair of large, buggy-looking wings,' 'two little seats,' and 'three wheels' beneath them.
explain.zh: GNAT 有“一对大大的、像虫子一样的翅膀”、“两个小座位”，下面还有“三个轮子”。

q.en: What does Judy bet Andrew over whether the GNAT will actually fly?
q.zh: 朱迪和安德鲁打赌，赌注是什么，赌的是 GNAT 到底能不能飞起来？

options.en: The last crumb of Uncle Al's super-delicious fudge
options.zh: 阿尔叔叔那块超级好吃的软糖的最后一点碎屑

explain.en: Judy says she is so hungry she will take the bet: 'the last crumb of Uncle Al's super-delicious fudge' that Andrew has in his pocket.
explain.zh: 朱迪说自己太饿了，于是答应打赌：赌注是安德鲁口袋里“阿尔叔叔那块超级好吃的软糖的最后一点碎屑”。

q.en: How does the GNAT get the power it needs to fly?
q.zh: GNAT 是靠什么获得飞行所需的动力的？

options.en: It stores energy as Andrew and Judy pedal, like winding a toy plane
options.zh: 它靠安德鲁和朱迪踩踏板储存能量，就像上发条玩具飞机

options.en: It is pulled by a tumbleweed

explain.en: Andrew says, 'The GNAT is storing energy as we pedal. It's like winding up a toy plane.' Then its wings start beating and it lifts off.
explain.zh: 安德鲁说：“我们踩踏板时，GNAT 在储存能量。这就像给玩具飞机上发条。”然后它的翅膀开始拍打，飞了起来。

q.en: After Andrew and Judy pedal, what happens to the GNAT?
q.zh: 安德鲁和朱迪踩踏板之后，GNAT 发生了什么？

options.en: Its wings beat faster and it lifts off into the trees
options.zh: 它的翅膀越拍越快，飞起来冲进了树丛

options.en: It sinks into the frog pond
It turns back into a dead leaf

explain.en: They pedal, the GNAT stores energy, then 'the GNAT's wings were beating' and it 'zoomed off the window ledge and into the trees.'
explain.zh: 他们踩着踏板，GNAT 储存能量，接着“GNAT 的翅膀拍打着”，它“从窗台上一冲而起，飞进了树丛”。
